meaning: n.(鍔炵悊姝ｅ紡鎵嬬画鍓嶇殑)棰勫厛鐧昏,棰勫厛娉ㄥ唽
examples: As we have to bear this responsibility you will understand that we only allow companies who cooperate with us in a proper contractual way to use our preregistration Numbers.
Considering that the Australian dollar exchanges favorably with many currencies, those who were unable to take advantage of preregistration discounts can still afford to travel to Brisbane.
